title: clusia ovalis
intro: Clusia ovalis, also known as the calabura or red clusia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clusia ovalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Herbal preparations of Clusia ovalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
